title: Quote of the Day by Usain Bolt: 'I don’t think limits' words of inspiration from the fastest man on Earth
summary_full: Usain Bolt’s quote, “I don’t think limits,” reflects a mindset shaped by injuries, setbacks, and discipline throughout his career. Beyond sprinting, it challenges people to resist early self-imposed ceilings, rethink what’s possible, and focus on solutions over judgment. Bolt’s approach emphasizes consistent effort, mental resilience, and refusing to let temporary setbacks define long-term potential, both on and off the track.
